title: rhamnus alpina f. cordata
intro: Rhamnus alpina f. cordata, also known as narrow-leaved alder buckthorn, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to offer several health benefits, such as supporting digestive health, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Narrow-leaved alder buckthorn can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
